summary: Tested Predictions tab smart redirect fix for COMPLETED matchday status. All tests passed. The shared goToPredictionsHub function correctly routes both Home CTA and Predictions tab to /live/{matchdayId} when matchday is COMPLETED.
critical_code_review_comments: Function correctly routes LIVE|COMPLETED → /live/{id} and OPEN|LOCKED → /(tabs)/predictions
Home CTA at line 254 correctly uses goToPredictionsHub with matchday status
Predictions tab useFocusEffect at lines 243-254 correctly triggers smart redirect when status is LIVE or COMPLETED
redirectedRef prevents redirect loop on the Predictions screen
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Predictions tab redirect is working correctly. When user ilio@raimondi.it logs in, they see Giornata 4 with COMPLETED status. Clicking the Predictions tab auto-redirects to /live/{matchdayId} showing the results screen. The VIEW RESULTS CTA on Home also navigates to the same screen. All 4 tabs (Home, Predictions, Rankings, Profile) render correctly at bottom of screen.

test_results_detail.login_flow: PASS - Login with ilio@raimondi.it / password123 works correctly

test_results_detail.home_view_results_cta: PASS - VIEW RESULTS button visible and correctly navigates to /live/{matchdayId}
test_results_detail.predictions_tab_smart_redirect: PASS - Clicking Predictions tab auto-redirects to /live/{matchdayId} for COMPLETED matchday
test_results_detail.tab_bar_rendering: PASS - All 4 tabs (Home, Predictions, Rankings, Profile) render correctly
test_results_detail.live_results_screen: PASS - Shows Giornata 4, PUNTI UFFICIALI (official points), match results with FT status
